3144620.name: subROV Original Soundtrack
3144620.description:
From the Author

This compilation includes all current music in the game subROV plus several bonus tracks, available both in lossless .FLAC and 320 kbps .mp3 formats.

The list will grow and change as I add more material; like subROV itself, this is a journey I'm sharing with you.

Thank you so much for listening!

Jose/Enveloop

Trivia - Charlie is a naval alternative for Clear, hence Track 03's name 😁
